properties.name: dm.bootstrap.archetype-schema-pattern
properties.description: Spring resource pattern for GSM base archetype JSON Schema files.

properties.name: dm.messaging.reliability-mode
properties.description: Kafka messaging reliability mode (alo-idempotent, eo, amo).

properties.name: dm.schema-registry.auto-register
properties.description: Whether to auto-register Avro/JSON schemas with the schema registry.

properties.name: dm.security.oauth2-login-enabled
properties.description: Enable OAuth2 social login (GitHub, Google, Microsoft).
